Package com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec

Class AbstractGeminiClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool.BaseClass
      • com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec.AbstractGeminiClient
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GeminiClient
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GeminiClientImp
    public abstract class AbstractGeminiClient
extends BaseClass
implements GeminiClient
    Abstract base class for Gemini client implementations, providing shared functionality.
    Since:
    0.0.1
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

      protected HttpClient httpClient
      The HTTP client to use for communication with the Gemini API.
      protected JsonService jsonService

      • apiKey

        protected final String apiKey

        The HTTP client to use for communication with the Gemini API.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractGeminiClient

        protected AbstractGeminiClient​(String apiKey,
                               String model,
                               HttpClient httpClient,
                               String baseUrl,
                               JsonService jsonService)
        Constructs a new AbstractGeminiClient with the required API key, model, HTTP client, base URL, and JSON service.
        Parameters:
        apiKey - The API key for authentication with the Gemini API.
        model - The default model to use for requests.
        httpClient - The HTTP client to use for communication.
        baseUrl - The base URL for the Gemini API.
        jsonService - The JSON service to use for serialization and deserialization.
